New Fidelity ETFs Focus on Crypto, Metaverse, ESG

holdings.infoBox: FMET is an equity ETF with a total of 64 individual holdings. The top holdings are Advanced Micro Devices stock at 10.34%, QUALCOMM at 6.23%, Alphabet at 4.82%, Monolithic Power Systems at 4.55%, and NVIDIA at 4.51%.

overview.description: The Fidelity Metaverse ETF (FMET) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Fidelity Metaverse index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of equities that provides global exposure to the future state of the internet: the metaverse. FMET was launched on Apr 19, 2022 and is issued by Fidelity.
